# RAVEN

> RAVEN (Real-time Aggregation and Verification Engine) is automated borrower verification software for community and regional banks. A loan officer sends one link; the borrower connects their bank in about 5 minutes; RAVEN returns identity, income, employment, and property data cross-referenced from seven providers with a full audit trail.

RAVEN is built for community banks, regional banks, and federal savings associations that originate mortgages, HELOCs, commercial real estate, and small business loans. It replaces the multi-week document chase that defines traditional verification with a 5-minute digital interaction — without replacing the bank's loan origination system.

## Core capabilities

- Identity & KYC: Socure RiskOS (identity validation, fraud scoring, synthetic identity detection, OFAC/PEP/global watchlist)
- Income & assets: Plaid (bank-connected income streams, transaction history, balances, liabilities)
- Employment: Truework (employer-verified salary, title, dates, active status)
- Property: Melissa + ATTOM dual AVM (valuation, tax assessment, comparable sales, ownership)
- Contact: FullContact (cross-referenced email, phone, demographic indicators)
- Cross-source reconciliation: confidence scores boost when providers agree; discrepancies are flagged before underwriting
- Audit trail: every data point sourced and timestamped for examiners

## Product pages

- [Home](https://reportraven.tech): product overview, how it works, request access
- [Blog](https://reportraven.tech/blog): research-backed articles on lending speed, compliance, and verification automation

## Articles

- [Why It Takes 42 Days to Close a Mortgage](https://reportraven.tech/blog/why-it-takes-42-days-to-close-a-mortgage): where time and cost actually go in mortgage origination
- [Community Banks Are Losing the Lending Race](https://reportraven.tech/blog/community-banks-are-losing-the-lending-race): the structural market-share shift from banks to non-bank lenders, and how to close the gap
- [Your Next Generation of Borrowers Won't Wait 42 Days](https://reportraven.tech/blog/next-generation-borrowers-wont-wait): Gen Z banking behavior and what it means for community banks
- [The $59 Billion Compliance Burden](https://reportraven.tech/blog/59-billion-compliance-burden): BSA/AML cost structure and the automation opportunity for community banks
- [How Figure Closes a HELOC in 5 Days](https://reportraven.tech/blog/how-figure-closes-heloc-in-5-days): teardown of Figure's S-1 and the replicable verification playbook
- [One Link, Complete Verification](https://reportraven.tech/blog/one-link-complete-verification): end-to-end walk-through of the RAVEN verification flow
